job_summary: An eClinical Systems Specialist manages and supports digital platforms used in clinical trials, ensuring smooth data flow and system functionality.
key_responsibilities: Manage systems like EDC (Electronic Data Capture), CTMS, eTMF
Configure and maintain clinical trial software
Ensure data integrity and system compliance
qualifications: Degree in Life Sciences / IT / Health Informatics
work_environment: CROs, pharma companies, health tech firms
career_path: eClinical Specialist → Systems Manager → Digital Clinical Lead
skills_required: configure and maintain clinical trial software
ensure data integrity and system compliance
